creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed


Sorry, but removing ths will result in the package not build on the pointyhat cluster. 
complaaining about "Left file after deinstall". 

same for other ports: 

/usr/ports/deskutils/xpad-current/pkg-plist:share/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache 
/usr/ports/deskutils/xpad/pkg-plist:share/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache 
/usr/ports/misc/xiphos/pkg-plist:share/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache 
/usr/ports/multimedia/imagination/pkg-plist:share/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache 
/usr/ports/sysutils/xfburn/pkg-plist:@unexec /bin/rm %D/share/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache 2>/dev/null || /usr/bin/true 
/usr/ports/sysutils/xfce4-power-manager/pkg-plist:share/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache 
/usr/ports/www/opera/pkg-plist:share/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache 
/usr/ports/x11-themes/icons-human-azul/pkg-plist:@unexec rm %D/share/icons/HumanAzul/icon-theme.cache 2>/dev/null || true 
/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gtk20/pkg-plist:@unexec /usr/bin/find %%LOCALBASE%%/share/icons -type f -depth 2 -name icon-theme.cache -delete 2>/dev/null || /usr/bin/true 
/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gtk30/pkg-plist:@unexec /usr/bin/find %%LOCALBASE%%/share/icons -type f -depth 2 -name icon-theme.cache -delete 2>/dev/null || /usr/bin/true 
/usr/ports/x11-wm/ccsm/pkg-plist:share/ccsm/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache 
/usr/ports/x11/kdelibs3/pkg-plist:@unexec /bin/rm %D/share/icons/crystalsvg/icon-theme.cache 2>/dev/null || /usr/bin/true
